zh.Kniveton, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾可尼維頓
zh.Mercaston, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Matthew III Kniveton於1248年出生在英國德比夏爾可尼維頓時，他的父親Roger Kniveton11245歲，母親Maud Stretton24歲。他於大約1275年與Matilda Stretton在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1301年之後在英國德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓。

zh-hans.Kniveton, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾可尼維頓
zh-hans.Mercaston, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Matthew III Kniveton于1248年出生在英国德比夏爾可尼維頓时，他的父亲Roger Kniveton11245岁，母亲Maud Stretton24岁。他于大约1275年与Matilda Stretton在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1301年之后在英国德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Kniveton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Kniveton (Derbys) or Kneeton (Notts).

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Matthew III Kniveton was born in 1248, in Kniveton, Derbyshire, England, his father, Roger Kniveton, was 11245 and his mother, Maud Stretton, was 24. He married Matilda Stretton about 1275, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died after 1301, in Mercaston, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Matthew III Kniveton est né en 1248, à Kniveton, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Kniveton, avait 11245 ans et sa mère, Maud Stretton, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Stretton environ 1275, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après 1301, à Mercaston, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Matthew III Kniveton 1248 in Kniveton, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Kniveton 11245 und seine Mutter Maud Stretton 24. Er hat um 1275 in England, United Kingdom Matilda Stretton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach 1301 in Mercaston, Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Matthew III Kniveton è nato il nel 1248 nel Kniveton, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Roger Kniveton, aveva 11245 anni e il suo madre, Maud Stretton, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Stretton circa 1275, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1301, nel Mercaston, Derbyshire, England.

ja., Derbyshire, England: イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイア

ja.Mercaston, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアメルカストン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Matthew III Knivetonが1248年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアニベトンで生まれた時，父Roger Knivetonは11245歳，母Maud Strettonは24歳であった。約1275年にイギリスイギリスでMatilda Strettonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1301年以後にイギリスデルブイシュアイアメルカストンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Matthew III Kniveton(이)가 1248년 영국 더비실르 니베턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Kniveton(은)는 11245세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Stretton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1275년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Matilda Stretton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1301년 이후 영국 더비실르 머카스턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Matthew III Kniveton nasceu em 1248, em Kniveton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Kniveton, tinha 11245 anos e sua mãe, Maud Stretton, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Stretton aproximadamente 1275, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após 1301, em Mercaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Matthew III Kniveton родился в 1248 г. в местности ниветон, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Kniveton было 11245 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Stretton, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Stretton около 1275 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после 1301 г. в местности миркастон, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Matthew III Kniveton nació en 1248, en Kniveton, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Kniveton, tenía 11245 años y su mamá, Maud Stretton, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Matilda Stretton aproximadamente 1275, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1301, en Mercaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
